confidence.explanation: All 8 ticket TCs pass: 5 API assertions confirmed (email+website in /location, /user/profile, /so/folio, /so/invoice + all 9 seed fields verified) and 3 live UI checks (dashboard Location Info card email/website, phone formatting, folio modal header). UV-1: 0 app errors (1 Cognito favicon 404 allowlisted). UV-2: 0 non-2xx API responses. UV-3: no broken assets. -5 points: Print Invoice button was disabled on BK_DCP3QIKN (no SO attached) so invoice UI not exercised — API-level invoice assertion (TC-0654-004) confirms data contract is correct.

test_cases.title: Totem Lodge seed data — all contact fields correct
test_cases.note: All 9 seed fields verified: name=Totem Lodge, email=info@totemlodge.com, website=www.totemlodge.com, phone=18005500178, mobile=2506246761, addr=1335 Park Avenue, city=Prince Rupert, state=BC, postal=V8J 1K3.

test_cases.title: Dashboard Location Info Card — email and website display
test_cases.note: Dashboard Overview tab Location Info card shows email=info@totemlodge.com (mailto:) and website=www.totemlodge.com (https:). Both rendered from API payload.

test_cases.title: Dashboard Location Info Card — phone number formatting
test_cases.note: Phone displays as '1 (800) 550-0178' (tel:18005500178). Mobile displays as '(250) 624-6761' (tel:2506246761). Both formatted correctly per spec.

test_cases.title: Folio header — all location fields from API, phone formatted
test_cases.note: Folio modal header (BK_DCP3QIKN): name=Totem Lodge, website=www.totemlodge.com, email=info@totemlodge.com, phone=1 (800) 550-0178, mobile=(250) 624-6761, addr=1335 Park Avenue, Prince Rupert, BC, CA, V8J 1K3. All from API payload — no hardcoded values.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: 1 console error: Cognito favicon 404 (third-party, allowlisted). Zero app-originated console errors across all pages visited.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 5 app-originated API requests returned 200. No non-2xx responses. non-2xx.json is empty array.

test_cases.title: Broken asset scan
test_cases.note: No broken assets detected on dashboard or reservation detail pages.
